name: Champion of Wits
oracleText: When Champion of Wits enters the battlefield, you may draw cards equal to its power. If you do, discard two cards.

name: Dreamstealer
oracleText: Menace Whenever Dreamstealer deals combat damage to a player, that player discards that many cards.

name: Earthshaker Khenra
oracleText: Haste When Earthshaker Khenra enters the battlefield, target creature with power less than or equal to Earthshaker Khenra's power can't block this turn.

name: Resilient Khenra
oracleText: When Resilient Khenra enters the battlefield, you may have target creature get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is Resilient Khenra's power.

name: Sinuous Striker
oracleText: {U}: Sinuous Striker gets +1/-1 until end of turn.

name: Sunscourge Champion
oracleText: When Sunscourge Champion enters the battlefield, you gain life equal to its power.
